'''matholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kynd|kynd]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kynd|kynd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| matholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mætheleth|mætheleth]] || [[word:mæthelej|mæthelej]] || [[word:mæthelesh|mæthelesh]] || [[word:mæthele|mæthele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mathotholoth|mathotholoth]] || [[word:mathotholoj|mathotholoj]] || [[word:mathotholosh|mathotholosh]] || [[word:mathotholo|mathotholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:matholoth|matholoth]] || [[word:matholoj|matholoj]] || [[word:matholosh|matholosh]] || [[word:matholo|matholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mathofloth|mathofloth]] || [[word:mathofloj|mathofloj]] || [[word:mathoflosh|mathoflosh]] || [[word:mathoflof|mathoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:matholotho|matholotho]] || [[word:matholojo|matholojo]] || [[word:matholosho|matholosho]] || [[word:matholoko|matholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:matholoth|matholoth]] || [[word:matholoj|matholoj]] || [[word:matholosh|matholosh]] || [[word:matholo|matholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:matholothol|matholothol]] || [[word:matholojol|matholojol]] || [[word:matholoshol|matholoshol]] || [[word:matholokol|matholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:matholothotho|matholothotho]] || [[word:matholojojo|matholojojo]] || [[word:matholoshosho|matholoshosho]] || [[word:matholoko|matholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:matholothon|matholothon]] || [[word:matholojon|matholojon]] || [[word:matholoshon|matholoshon]] || [[word:matholokon|matholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:matholothoro|matholothoro]] || [[word:matholojoro|matholojoro]] || [[word:matholoshoro|matholoshoro]] || [[word:matholokoro|matholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
